title: UK to European Travel Adaptor with 4 USB Ports(1 USB C), Grounded EU Euro Europe to UK Power Plug Adapter for Germany Spain France Iceland Greece Poland Netherlands Austria Turkey etc (Type E/F)
features: 5 in 1 EU Travel Adapter - Omivine UK to EU plug adapter has 1 AC socket (UK 3-pin), 1 USB-C, and 3 USB-A charging ports. The EU Travel plug adapter can power up to 5 devices simultaneously. The USB C charging port is 5V/3A, and the USB A charging ports are 5V/2.4A. Ideal for charging cameras, tablets, smartphones, shavers, hair dryers, etc. when traveling in European. The maximum power is 2500w.

EU Grounded Type E/F Plug Adapter - The European plug adapter can be compatible with most Europe countries such as Germany, France, Spain, Greece, Iceland, the Netherlands, Norway, Poland, Portugal, Estonia, Ethiopia, Morocco, Denmark, Belgium, Turkey, Finland, Sweden and more countries using E/F plugs. (Not for Italy, Switzerland, etc. )

Safe and Reliable - Omivine UK to EU plug adapters have built-in multi-protection, overload/over-current/over-voltage/short-circuit/over-heat protection, and are designed with a child-safe shutter. 750°C flame retardant housing is made from robust and high-quality plastic to resist high temperatures and eliminate fire hazards. Multiple protections for you and your children.

NOT A VOLTAGE CONVERTER - Please note that this EU travel adapter is a plug converter and not a voltage converter. Please ensure your appliance supports dual or multiple voltages with an input voltage range of 100-250V for use in other countries/regions.

Lightweight and Portable - Compact and lightweight, this travel adapter is adaptable and won't easily fall off the wall. The perfect travel accessory to save space in your suitcase for holidays, exchanges, studies, and work trips abroad.
